tools.name: alerts.getAlertsAlertId

tools.description: Get annotations of an alert by id.

tools.description: Get notifications of all users by alert id.

tools.description: Get overview alert by id.

tools.name: alerts.getAlertsReport
tools.description:
Returns information about the occurred alert volume in different time periods as well as information about the
response behaviour (amount of confirmed and unhandled alerts) of your team members.

tools.name: alerts.postAlerts
tools.description: Triggers a new alert for your team. All team members on duty will receive alert notifications.

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsAcknowledgeAll
tools.description: This method confirms all unhandled alerts your team currently has by a specific user.

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsAcknowledgeMultiple
tools.description: This method confirms all alerts provided.

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsAlertIdAcknowledge
tools.description: Acknowledge an alert

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsAlertIdAnnotate
tools.description: Annotates an alert by given Annotation Info.

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsAlertIdClose
tools.description: Close an alert

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsAlertIdUndoAcknowledge
tools.description: This method tries to undo an alert acknowledgement.

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsAlertIdUndoClose
tools.description: This method tries to undo an alert close.

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsCloseAll
tools.description: This method closes all acknowledged alerts your team currently has.

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsCloseMultiple
tools.description: This method closes all alerts provided.

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsPaged
tools.description: Gets alerts paged

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsUndoAcknowledgeMultiple
tools.description: This method tries to undo the acknowledgement of multiple alerts via a queue. The operation is handled in the background.

tools.name: alerts.postAlertsUndoCloseMultiple
tools.description: This method tries to undo multiple alert closes. The operation is handled in the background.
